<?php namespace Twilio\Jwt\Grants; class VideoGrant implements Grant { private $room; /** * Returns the room * * @return string room name or sid set in this grant */ public function getRoom(): string { return $this->room; } /** * Set the room to allow access to in the grant * * @param string $roomSidOrName room sid or name * @return $this updated grant */ public function setRoom(string $roomSidOrName): self { $this->room = $roomSidOrName; return $this; } /** * Returns the grant type * * @return string type of the grant */ public function getGrantKey(): string { return 'video'; } /** * Returns the grant data * * @return array data of the grant */ public function getPayload(): array { $payload = []; if ($this->room) { $payload['room'] = $this->room; } return $payload; } }
